description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a dark brown, natural wood grain finish. The structure features three open shelves, providing ample storage or display space, and the back and sides are fully enclosed. The wood texture is visible on all surfaces, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or street-side kiosks. The shelves are evenly spaced and the interior is open, allowing for easy access and organization of items. The unit stands on small, barely visible feet, which may aid in slight mobility or leveling. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and utilitarian design.
description: A dark brown, wood-grain shelving unit with three open shelves and a fully enclosed back and sides. Its rustic, modern look is ideal for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Side view showing a flat, wood-textured panel with no openings or features.
description_view_1: Opposite side view, also displaying a plain, wood-textured surface with no shelves or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous wood grain panel, fully enclosing the back of the unit.
description_view_3: Front view revealing three open shelves and the interior storage space, the primary access point for use.
